obisrecipes 0.0.0.9000

OBIS-style binned color scale for ggplot2

obis_scale.Rd

Returns a list of two ggplot2 components — a ggplot2::scale_fill_manual() with labelled break bins and a ggplot2::theme() that styles the legend — matching the visual style used on the OBIS taxon pages.

Usage

obis_scale(
  breaks = c(1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000),
  colors = c("#2c7bb6", "#abd9e9", "#ffffbf", "#fdae61", "#d7191c"),
  legend_title = "Records",
  na_color = "grey80",
  key_spacing = 4
)

Arguments

breaks

Numeric vector of bin boundaries. The last value is used as the label for the open-ended top bin. Default c(1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000).

colors

Character vector of hex colors, one per bin. Must be the same length as breaks. Default is a blue-to-red diverging palette.

legend_title

Character. Title shown above the legend. Default "Records".

na_color

Character. Fill color for NA values. Default "grey80".

key_spacing

Numeric. Vertical spacing between legend keys in points. Default 4.

Value

A list of two ggplot2 objects that can be added to a plot with +.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
grey_map_s() |>
    add_species_data_s(grid_data = get_occ_tiles(141438)) +
    obis_scale(breaks = c(1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000))
} # }
